features.label: Site Permissions Manager
features.desc: Address bar mein shield icon — Camera, Mic, Notifications, Location, Clipboard, MIDI aur 25+ permissions. Allow/Ask/Block 3-state toggle. Remember my decision checkbox. 30s auto-deny timer.
features.howto: Address bar mein shield icon click karo. Shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+I

features.label: Permission Request Prompt
features.desc: Jab koi site permission maange toh custom prompt dikhta hai — permission-specific icon aur color, Remember checkbox, Block/Allow buttons, 30s countdown timer bar.
features.howto: Kisi bhi site pe camera/mic/location use karo — prompt automatically aayega.

features.label: Site Permissions in Settings
features.desc: Settings → Privacy → Site Permissions. Saari sites accordion list, search by domain, stats (sites/allowed/blocked), reset individual site ya all.

features.label: Background Themes
features.desc: 10 background color palettes — Teal, Teal Mist, Midnight, Slate, Forest, Crimson, Ocean, Aurora, Amber, Obsidian. Accordion UI in Settings. Live apply, persists across sessions.

features.label: Custom Accent Color
features.desc: 8 preset swatches + custom color picker. Poora browser UI live update — tabs, toolbar, address bar, toggles, badges sab.

features.label: Full CSS Variable System
features.desc: Saare browser UI elements ab CSS variables se control hote hain — --bg-base, --bg-surface, --accent etc. Theme switch instant hota hai.

features.label: GitHub Releases Updater
features.desc: Settings → Updates mein saari releases list — version, date, size, changelog preview. Download .exe ya Install directly (app closes, installer launches). Rollback protection for older versions.
features.howto: Settings → System → Updates → Check for Updates

features.label: Last Checked Timestamp
features.desc: "Last checked: 2 hours ago" — user ko pata chale kab check hua tha. localStorage mein persist hota hai.

features.label: What's Installed Indicator
features.desc: Version card mein colored dot — Green (release build), Amber (applied commit), Purple (dev mode). Applied commit SHA bhi dikhta hai.

features.label: Delete Applied Commits
features.desc: Agar commit-based update applied hai toh ek click se delete karo aur bundled version pe revert karo.

features.label: Updater timeout fix
features.desc: applyCommit aur fetchCommits ke liye timeout 5s se 120s kiya — GitHub slow hone pe Unknown error nahi aayega.

features.label: Network error fix
features.desc: GitHub Releases API ke liye proper User-Agent aur Accept headers add kiye — Network error resolve hua.
